summary: Comprehensive testing of King Klub Battle/Challenge system completed. Fixed routing issue in /api/challenges/voting-open endpoint. All 19 backend tests passing. Frontend UI flows verified including user login, admin login, battles page, and leaderboard.

minor.issue: WebSocket connection sometimes fails with 403 errors initially, but eventually connects. May be related to Kubernetes ingress configuration.

fixed.issue: Route was being captured by /api/challenges/{challenge_id} pattern, returning 403/404
fixed.fix: Moved /challenges/voting-open route definition BEFORE /challenges/{challenge_id} in server.py

passed_tests: /auth/me returns user data with valid token
Frontend: Dashboard displays user stats and rank
Frontend: Admin panel with battles management
Frontend: Battles page displays active battles
Sound effects integration in VotePopup component verified
critical_code_review_comments: WebSocket connection at /ws shows intermittent 403 errors in console before connecting - may need investigation for production
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_opponent@example.com user for battle testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Battle/Challenge system fully tested. Route ordering fix applied to server.py. VotePopup has sound effects integrated via Web Audio API. WebSocket at /ws broadcasts OPEN_VOTING and CLOSE_VOTING events. 3 active battles exist: Royal Performer vs TEST Opponent, King Lur vs King Kota, King Admin vs King Lur.

features_verified.admin_dashboard: Working - shows 12 users, battle management tab
features_verified.battle_creation: Working - can create challenges between users
features_verified.websocket: Endpoint exists at /ws, connects after initial retries
features_verified.open_voting: Working - admin can open voting, broadcasts to clients
features_verified.finalize_challenge: Working - admin can finalize and award points
features_verified.leaderboard: Working - displays user rankings with rank badges
features_verified.qr_checkin: Working - admin can get QR data
